name: Velveeta Cheese Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the Velveeta cheese and margarine together in a saucepan over low heat.
2. Stir in the vanilla until well combined.
3. In a large bowl, sift together the powdered sugar and cocoa.
4. Gradually add the melted cheese mixture to the dry ingredients, stirring continuously.
5. Fold in the nuts.
6. Pour the mixture evenly into two greased 9" x 13" baking pans.
7. Allow the fudge to cool completely before cutting into desired sizes.
Yield: 6 to 6 1/2 pounds candy.
